source_provenance.meshy_usage: bounded hand and foot surface-detail references only; topology, weights, bind hierarchy remain carrier-owned

material_gate.consequence: The carrier may be promoted for geometry, skeleton, bind/reference-pose, and animation integration. It may not be represented as a textured/PBR final character until authored material inputs are separately accepted.

runtime_contract.joint_buffer: per-actor, dynamically sized from the loaded mesh bone count
runtime_contract.pose_authority: c0_reference_pose.json plus C0 world-frame retarget calibration; not a rebaked rest mesh
runtime_contract.material_behavior: explicit neutral carrier fallback is allowed only while PBR inputs are absent; shader must not silently claim to sample unavailable textures
prohibited: tuning C0 around invalid raw MotionBricks source motion

visual_evidence.finding: Current Blender Workbench close render: continuous full-body neutral/reference silhouette; visible fingers and toes; no visible exploded mesh or detached limb.
Authoritative simultaneous 60-degree finger/toe stress frame: continuous limbs and torso, no visible skinning spikes.
Authoritative hand stress close-up: curled fingers retain separated silhouettes and remain connected to palm/wrist.
Authoritative foot stress close-up: individual toe silhouettes remain present and continuous with the forefoot.

next_gate: C0-RUNTIME-CLOSURE-001: replace legacy mannequin loading and fixed 24-joint skinning with the C0 contract, then verify static/reference and measured primitive renders before enabling generated motion.
